body_txt: It seems that by some law of Shapeshifting, shapeshifters are unable to change their eyes, no matter how skilled they are at changing form. Showing the eye changing or corrupting into that of a different species is an effective way of showing mental takeover or transformation-induced humanity loss thanks to this. See Glamour Failure for a similar trope and Voices Are Mental for the vocal version of this trope. A specific type of Morphic Resonance . Much like Voices Are Mental , some examples may be visible to other characters, others are merely Stylized for the Viewer . Heavy overlap with Eye-Dentity Giveaway , with the major difference being in that a person's eye color or design is what indicates whether or not a person is an imposter.
